monster.name: Amalgam
languages: speaks all languages but doesn't understand any

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: The amalgam is immune to any power, spell, or effect that would alter their form.

trait.name: Lake Rebirth
entries: If destroyed, the amalgam reforms in the Lake of Rot 24 hours later with all their hit points.

trait.name: Primordial Influence
entries: A {@condition dazed|FleeMortals} enemy who starts their turn within 20 feet of the amalgam must make a {@dc 16} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, that creature's body is altered in an otherworldly way of the GM's choice—they might flicker in and out of reality, sprout miniature fingers from their fingers, or have their physical form altered in a similarly alien way. This alteration doesn't affect the creature's game statistics. A cure ailment power of 4th order or higher, a {@spell greater restoration} spell, or a similar supernatural effect reverses this alteration.

While altered in this way, a creature must repeat the saving throw whenever they finish a long rest. On a failed save, their previous alteration worsens or they experience another chaotic alteration of the GM's choice. If a creature fails this saving throw three times after their initial alteration, they transform into an amalgam controlled by the GM, and only a {@spell wish} spell can restore the creature to their original form.

trait.name: Viscous Vicinity
entries: The amalgam envelops their surroundings in their shifting reality. The area within 20 feet of them is difficult terrain for other creatures.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The amalgam makes two Reality Rend attacks. They can replace one attack with a use of Pull.

action.name: Reality Rend
entries: {@atk mp} +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d10 + 4}) psychic damage, and the target must succeed on a {@dc 16} Wisdom saving throw or be {@condition dazed|FleeMortals} until the start of the amalgam's next turn.

action.name: Pull
entries: The amalgam warps reality around up to three creatures they can see within 60 feet of them. Each target must succeed on a {@dc 16} Strength saving throw or be pulled up to 30 feet directly toward the amalgam.

monster.name: Empowered Bog Body
languages: understands the languages they knew in life but can't speak

trait.name: Acidic Blood
entries: A creature who deals piercing or slashing damage to the bog body while within 5 feet of them takes 3 ({@damage 1d6}) acid damage.

action.name: Slam
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 10} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@damage 1d6 + 8}) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, they are {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 18}). Until this grapple ends, the bog body can't make a Slam attack against another target.

action.name: Sling Mud
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 10} to hit, range 30 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d4 + 8}) bludgeoning damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) acid damage.

action.name: Submerge
entries: If the bog body is in swampy terrain, they can submerge themself beneath the water and mud. While submerged, the bog body is heavily obscured.

If the bog body is grappling a target when they submerge, the target submerges with them. While submerged, the target is heavily obscured, {@condition restrained}, and unable to breathe, and takes 4 ({@damage 1d8}) acid damage at the start of each of their turns.
A bog body can resurface as a bonus action. When they do so, a target they have {@condition grappled} also resurfaces.

trait.name: Crafty
entries: The underboss doesn't provoke opportunity attacks when they move out of an enemy's reach.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The underboss makes two Shortsword attacks or two Shortbow attacks. They can replace one attack with a use of Command.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) piercing damage.

action.name: Shortbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 5} to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) piercing damage.

action.name: Command
entries: The underboss chooses one ally they can see within 30 feet of them. If the target can hear the underboss, the target can use their reaction to move up to their speed or make one weapon attack.

bonus.name: Get Reckless {@recharge}
entries: Each willing ally within 30 feet of the underboss who can hear them becomes reckless until the start of the underboss's next turn. While reckless, a creature has advantage on attack rolls, and attack rolls against the creature have advantage.

reaction.name: Cowardly Commander
entries: When a creature the underboss can see hits them with an attack, the underboss chooses a willing ally within 5 feet of them. The attack hits the ally instead.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The underboss can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Crafty
entries: The underboss doesn't provoke opportunity attacks when they move out of an enemy's reach.

trait.name: Servant Senses
entries: Ithu'rath can sense anything the underboss senses, and Ithu'rath can speak through their body.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The underboss makes two Shortsword attacks or two Shortbow attacks. They can replace one attack with a use of Command.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) piercing damage.

action.name: Shortbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 5} to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) piercing damage.

action.name: Command
entries: The underboss chooses one ally they can see within 30 feet of them. If the target can hear the underboss, the target can use their reaction to move up to their speed or make one weapon attack.

bonus.name: Get Reckless {@recharge}
entries: Each willing ally within 30 feet of the underboss who can hear them becomes reckless until the start of the underboss's next turn. While reckless, a creature has advantage on attack rolls, and attack rolls against the creature have advantage.

reaction.name: Cowardly Commander
entries: When a creature the underboss can see hits them with an attack, the underboss chooses a willing ally within 5 feet of them. The attack hits the ally instead.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The brawler can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Exploit Opening (3/Day)
entries: When the brawler makes an attack, they have advantage on the attack roll.

trait.name: Servant Senses
entries: Ithu'rath can sense anything the brawler senses, and Ithu'rath can speak through their body.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The brawler makes two attacks using Grab, Haymaker, or both.

action.name: Grab
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one Medium or smaller creature. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) bludgeoning damage, and the target is {@condition grappled} (escape {@dc 13}). Until this grapple ends, the brawler can't grab another creature.

action.name: Haymaker
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d4 + 3}) bludgeoning damage, or 10 ({@damage 3d4 + 3}) bludgeoning damage against a {@condition grappled} target.

action.name: Throw
entries: The brawler throws one Medium or smaller creature they are grappling or object they are holding up to 30 feet horizontally. If the thrown target is a creature, they fall {@condition prone} after this throw. If the thrown target would enter the space of a creature or solid object that is no more than one size smaller than it, the thrown target collides with it and stops in the nearest unoccupied space, taking 3 ({@damage 1d6}) bludgeoning damage for every 10 feet it was thrown. A Large or smaller creature hit by this thrown target must succeed on a {@dc 13} Dexterity saving throw or take the same amount of damage and fall {@condition prone}.

reaction.name: Meat Shield
entries: When the brawler is grappling a target and is hit by a ranged attack made by another creature the brawler can see, the brawler gains a +2 bonus to AC against the triggering attack. If this bonus causes the attack to miss the brawler, it hits the {@condition grappled} target instead.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The trickshot can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Exploit Opening (3/Day)
entries: When the trickshot makes an attack, they have advantage on the attack roll.

trait.name: Point Blank Shooting
entries: When the trickshot hits a creature within 30 feet of them with a ranged weapon attack, they deal an extra 7 ({@damage 2d6}) piercing damage. Additionally, being within 5 feet of an enemy doesn't impose disadvantage on the trickshot's ranged attack rolls.

trait.name: Servant Senses
entries: Ithu'rath can sense anything the trickshot senses, and Ithu'rath can speak through their body.

action.name: Heavy Crossbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 6} to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) piercing damage.

action.name: Bayonet
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) piercing damage.

action.name: Ricochet Bolt {@recharge 5}
entries: The trickshot uses a special ricocheting bolt to make one Heavy Crossbow attack against a target within 100 feet of them, then a second Heavy Crossbow attack against a different target within 30 feet of the first target.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The bloodeye can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Servant Senses
entries: Ithu'rath can sense anything the bloodeye senses, and Ithu'rath can speak through their body.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The bloodeye makes one Bite or one Bola attack and uses Bloodeye Bolt or Mesmeric Lure, if available.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) piercing damage.

action.name: Bola
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 5} to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) bludgeoning damage, and the target is {@condition restrained} by the bola. A creature can use their action to make a {@dc 10} Strength check, freeing themself or another creature within their reach from the bola on a success. Dealing 5 slashing damage to the bola (AC 10) destroys it and frees a creature {@condition restrained} by it without harming them.

action.name: Bloodeye Bolt (3/Day)
entries: The bloodeye shoots blood from their eyes at one creature they can see within 30 feet of them. The target must succeed on a {@dc 13} Constitution saving throw or be {@condition blinded} for 1 minute (save ends at end of turn).

action.name: Mesmeric Lure (3/Day)
entries: The bloodeye hypnotically stares at one creature they can see within 30 feet of them. The target must succeed on a {@dc 13} Wisdom saving throw or all creatures other than the bloodeye are {@condition invisible} to them until the end of the bloodeye's next turn.

reaction.name: Reptilian Escape (1/Day)
entries: If the bloodeye fails a Strength or Dexterity saving throw, they lose their tail and succeed instead. They regrow their tail when they finish a long rest.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The lackey can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Goring Run
entries: If the lackey moves at least 20 feet straight toward an enemy and then ends their movement within 5 feet of the enemy, the enemy takes 1 piercing damage.

trait.name: Minion
entries: If the lackey takes damage from an attack or as the result of a failed saving throw, their hit points are reduced to 0. If the lackey takes damage from another effect, they die if the damage equals or exceeds their hit point maximum; otherwise they take no damage.

trait.name: Servant Senses
entries: Ithu'rath can sense anything the lackey senses, and Ithu'rath can speak through their body.

action.name: Goring Horns (Group Attack)
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 5} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}3 piercing damage. If this attack was made by more than one lackey, the target must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be moved 5 feet horizontally for each minion who joined the attack. The DC for this saving throw equals 10 plus the number of lackeys who joined the attack.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The rampart can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Relentless (1/Turn)
entries: When the rampart isn't {@condition incapacitated} and they are reduced to 0 hit points but not killed outright, they can make an attack against an enemy (no action required) before the hit point reduction is resolved. If the attack hits and its damage reduces the target to 0 hit points, the rampart drops to 1 hit point instead of 0 hit points.

trait.name: Servant Senses
entries: Ithu'rath can sense anything the rampart senses, and Ithu'rath can speak through their body.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The rampart makes two Spear attacks. If the rampart targets the same creature with both attacks, the target has disadvantage on attack rolls against creatures other than the rampart until the start of the rampart's next turn.

action.name: Spear
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) piercing damage, or 8 ({@damage 1d8 + 4}) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.

reaction.name: No!
entries: When an enemy within 5 feet of the rampart targets another creature with an attack, the attacker must target the rampart instead.
